known_issues: App fails to load immediately on open; shows generic error: "Something unexpected happened... We encountered an issue loading this page."

existing_features.title: Fix the app’s immediate-on-open crash that triggers the ErrorBoundary fallback screen ("Something unexpected happened") so the landing page reliably renders on first load.

Harden browser history state synchronization in useExperienceNavigationState so it never throws when window.history.state is null or a non-object, and it preserves any existing history.state fields when adding the mindvault_experience flag.

Improve crash diagnostics when the ErrorBoundary is hit by surfacing the underlying runtime error details in the UI in a non-intrusive way while keeping the existing user-facing message text in English and unchanged in meaning.

projectName: Fix immediate app-load crash causing ErrorBoundary fallback screen
